findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in the code example are missing from hints: `Project` (used 3 times as the entity being locked), `ExecutionContext` (method parameter type), `Result` (return type), `Success` (return value).
findings.source_evidence: Code example contains: `Project.class.getName()`, `UniversalDao.findBySqlFile(Project.class, ...)`, `UniversalDao.update(project)`, `ExecutionContext ctx` (×2), `public Result handle(...)`, `return new Success()`
